things.name: Hollywood Walk of Fame
things.description: Iconic 1.3-mile stretch of stars honouring over 2,700 entertainment legends

things.name: Getty Center
things.description: Magnificent hilltop museum with European paintings, sculptures and panoramic city views

things.name: Griffith Observatory
things.description: Landmark observatory on the slopes of Griffith Park with sweeping views of the city and Hollywood Sign

things.name: Santa Monica Pier
things.description: Historic 1909 pier with Pacific Park amusement park, Ferris wheel and the Route 66 end point

things.name: LACMA
things.description: Los Angeles County Museum of Art — the largest art museum in the western USA

things.name: Universal Studios Hollywood
things.description: World-famous movie theme park with studio tours and immersive rides based on blockbusters

things.name: Venice Beach Boardwalk
things.description: Colourful oceanfront promenade with street performers, muscle beach and Abbot Kinney boutiques

things.name: The Broad Museum
things.description: Free contemporary art museum in downtown LA housing works by Koons, Basquiat and Hirst

things.name: Disneyland Resort
things.description: Walt Disney's original Magic Kingdom in Anaheim, the happiest place on earth since 1955

things.name: Hollywood Sign Hike
things.description: Iconic 137-ft letters on Mount Lee — hike Griffith Park trails for the ultimate photo opportunity
